name: 🤫 Silent Hunt
description: No talking allowed! Use gestures, expressions, and creativity to find your target!
instructions: You cannot speak for the next 45 seconds. Use hand gestures, facial expressions, or write notes. Get creative with your communication!

name: 🗣️ Whisper Challenge
description: Shhh! All conversations must be whispered for the next 45 seconds!
instructions: All communication must be whispered. Get close to people to talk. Create intimate conversations. Secrets are more fun when whispered...

name: 🦁 Animal Kingdom
description: Communicate only through animal sounds and movements! Roar, chirp, or hop your way to victory!
instructions: No human words allowed! Choose an animal and embody it. Make animal sounds and movements. The wildest hunter wins!

name: 🪞 Mirror Mirror
description: Copy the movements of the person you're talking to! Mirror their gestures and expressions!
instructions: Mirror every movement of people you interact with. Copy their gestures and expressions. Make conversations hilariously awkward!

name: 💝 Compliment Cascade
description: Every conversation must start with a genuine compliment! Spread the positivity!
instructions: Start every interaction with a sincere compliment. Make people feel amazing about themselves. Spread joy and positivity!

name: 🤖 Robot Takeover
description: BEEP BOOP! All humans must now communicate like robots for optimal efficiency!
instructions: INITIATING ROBOT MODE. ALL COMMUNICATION MUST BE ROBOTIC. USE MECHANICAL MOVEMENTS. BEEP AND BOOP FREQUENTLY. EMOTION CIRCUITS DISABLED.

name: 🎵 Rhyme Time
description: Every sentence must end with a rhyme! Make your words flow and shine!
instructions: Every sentence you speak must rhyme with something. Get creative with your wordplay. Make conversations poetic and fun!

name: 🦸 Hero Hour
description: Strike dramatic superhero poses while talking! Save the day with style!
instructions: Strike a superhero pose every time you talk to someone. Cape flowing, hands on hips, dramatic stances only! Be the hero this game needs!

name: 😀 Emoji Express
description: Communication through facial expressions only! Let your face do the talking!
instructions: No words allowed! Use only facial expressions and gestures. Become a human emoji. Express everything through your face!
